_comment: PromptMaxxers teacher roster. To ADD a teacher: copy a block, fill the fields, drop an avatar SVG/PNG in /assets/teachers/, commit + push. The site auto-redeploys and the new teacher appears. No code change needed. See TEACHERS.md.

teachers.name: Gian
teachers.title: Founder · Claude-native systems
teachers.bio: Builds Nucleus Brain — a Claude-orchestration platform with MCP servers, sub-agents, and production governance — running 16 ventures under AGFarms. Teaches the Claude Certified Architect prep cohort and 1:1 sessions on prompt engineering, AI-engineer interview prep, and AI-native workflows.
